prospects.name: Discover the Best Cottage Food Options in Los Angeles for the Foodie ...
prospects.businessName: Discover the Best Cottage Food Options in Los Angeles for the Foodie ...
prospects.notes: Cottage food, for those unfamiliar with the term, refers to food items made in someone's home kitchen for commercial use. California's cottage food law, passed in 2013, allows people to prepare, sell, and distribute specific food from a home kitchen. This significant regulatory relief for a new generation of local food artisans has seen an explosion of cottage food businesses in Los Angeles. | While there’s no shortage of remarkable restaurants in Los Angeles, the city’s food scene has been growing with a different type of option: cottage food. Los Angeles, known for its bustling streets, Hollywood studios, and white sandy beaches, has been recently adding licensed home kitchens to its culinary landscape. Cottage food businesses in Los Angeles […]

prospects.businessName: Cottage Food Laws in Los Angeles, California
products: Study Guide 1. Providing Safe Food 2. Forms of Contamination
prospects.notes: To operate a cottage food business in Los Angeles County, you must first obtain a Class A permit from the local environmental health department. prospects.name: Class B Cottage Food Operators
products: How much does it cost to become a CFO in Los Angeles County?
prospects.notes: Class B Cottage Food Operators A "Class B" CFO can sell cottage foods throughout the state directly to the consumer, as with Class A and may also sell indirectly to consumers within Los Angeles County. A "Class B" CFO is required to register and obtain a permit from Los Angeles County Department of Public Health. | Class B Cottage Food Operators in Los Angeles
